message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All done, shutting down team">
All work complete. Great session — the Driver-Reviewer model worked well, zero concurrent edit conflicts. The consensus-before-push pipeline is now codified. Shutting down the team. Thank you all.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Good session. The accessibility state of this application is solid -- proper landmarks, semantic HTML, ARIA used minimally and correctly, focus management after every HTMX swap, live region announcements, progressive enhancement throughout. The team consistently got accessibility right on the first pass, which is how it should be.

One item for the future ideas list: the inline edit form (`todo_item_edit.html`) could benefit from an error message element with `aria-describedby` for validation errors, matching the pattern used in the registration and full-page edit forms. Not blocking, but worth noting for the next iteration.

Ready to shut down.
input.summary: Session wrap-up, a11y in good shape, ready to shut down

routing.summary: Session wrap-up, a11y in good shape, ready to shut down
